plugin_file_manager_desc: System file and directory management with user path and file reading support.
plugin_file_manager_list_desc: Lists files and folders (e.g., list:desktop, list:core, list:plugins).
plugin_file_manager_conta_desc: Provides a detailed count of items in a folder.
plugin_file_manager_read_desc: Reads the content of a text file (configurable lines).
plugin_file_manager_max_read_lines_desc: Maximum number of lines to display when reading a file
plugin_file_manager_max_list_items_desc: Maximum number of items to list (0 = no list)
plugin_file_manager_enable_path_mapping_: Enables symbolic path mapping (desktop, core, etc.)
plugin_file_manager_not_file: '{path}' is not a file or does not exist.
plugin_file_manager_cmd_unknown: FILE_MANAGER command not recognized. Use list:, count: or read:
